name: lekkistays
description: Premium shortlet booking platform for Lagos, Nigeria with WhatsApp integration

scripts.deploy:user: cp vercel-user.json vercel.json && vercel --prod && rm vercel.json
scripts.deploy:admin: cp vercel-admin.json vercel.json && vercel --prod && rm vercel.json
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:user && npm run deploy:admin
